title: Pseudoliparis schumanniana
taxonomy: Pseudoliparis schumanniana is a species of fish in the family Liparidae. It belongs to the genus Pseudoliparis and is classified under the kingdom Animalia. This species is also classified under the phylum Chordata, class Actinopterygii, and order Scorpaeniformes. Pseudoliparis schumanniana is further grouped under the family Liparidae, subfamily Liparinae, and tribe Liparini. Its classification provides insights into its evolutionary relationships and ecological position within the marine ecosystem.
